stem:
The table shows the probability of rain, as a percent, at a certain location for each day during a four-day period.

DayProbability of rain (%)
Monday25
Tuesday80
Wednesday45
Thursday60

According to the table, for which day during this four-day period is the probability of rain 25%?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. According to the table, Monday has a probability of rain of 25%.

Choices B, C, and D show different values (80%, 45%, and 60% respectively).
